conclusions.A_proven: V8 Full 12.5K significantly improves weighted BAC, bond, active-angle, and ring deltas relative to Source on the same 10K records; acceptance and movement trade-offs are reported separately.
conclusions.B_not_yet_proven: The frozen D1 checkpoint is not a strict matched control. Attribution to V8 constraints requires the matched D1-only 12.5K exposure-control run.
